name: max4c-bugbook
description: Bugbook app plugin marketplace — bundles the Bugbook workflow plugin and the max general skills plugin so users get both with one marketplace add.

plugins.name: bugbook
plugins.description: Bugbook workflow skills — flow, ticket, go, prep, catchup, and supporting tools for running the Bugbook app as a project management system.

plugins.name: max
plugins.description: General building skills — grill-me, write-prd, tdd, and more. Project-agnostic skills that enhance any workflow. Required companion for the bugbook plugin's active spec grilling.
